title: Startale raises $50M from SBI to complete $63M Series A
message_html: Startale raises $50M from SBI to complete $63M Series A ...
snippet: Startale said SBI invested $50 million to complete its Series A, with the firms working on tokenized securities, stablecoins and consumer onchain products in Japan.

title: Bitget Wallet launches onchain payments matrix
snippet: Bitget Wallet, the everyday finance app, today unveiled the "Onchain Payments Matrix," a global payment infrastructure designed to connect fragmented financial rails and support stablecoin payments across everyday consumer use and emerging agentic economic activity.
